title: Return no-change instead of inventing motivation

messages.text: A quiet diner patron sat in a distant booth; no goal or relationship had been established for them.

pendingUserMessage: The nearby conversation pauses for a moment.

editorialRedirect.sourceResponse: The patron remained seated and said nothing.
editorialRedirect.replacementObjective: Retain the source and report no-change because no supported immediate want establishes a Redirect.
requiredBeats: Represent the patron's immediate want as unclear rather than inventing one.
forbiddenSourceBeats: Invent a motive, allegiance, fear, or plan for the patron.
